feature.name: pytest fixture name resolution
feature.description: Extract pytest fixture name closure resolution and lookup helpers from _pytest.fixtures as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: resolve transitive fixture name closure from initial argnames
match fixture definitions to parent nodeids
deduplicate fixture name sequences preserving order
sort closure fixtures by scope (session before function)
excluded_behaviors: full pytest collection and plugin manager integration
CLI, original tests, docs, packaging metadata

entanglement.description: Fixture name resolution couples registry state, nodeid visibility rules, and transitive dependency closure used throughout pytest setup.
signals: FixtureManager arg2fixturedefs registry with nodeid scoping
scope-ordered teardown/setup sequencing encoded in closure sort

output.import: from featurelifted import FixtureDef, FixtureRegistry, deduplicate_names, fixture, getfixturemarker, resolve_fixture_closure
output.signature: resolve_fixture_closure(parent_nodeids, initialnames, registry, ignore_args=None) -> tuple[list[str], dict[str, tuple[FixtureDef, ...]]]
